notes: S through C must come from the curated Idol Ranking 2025 mapping file, not from interpolation.
Groups absent from the curated ranking file may only be inferred into D, E, or F.
B and C are only assigned manually, not from interpolation.
Popularity and fans from idolsdiagram.com are valid inference inputs, but they are not sufficient to promote a group into S through C.

inference.d_floor_source: minimum effective_score among authoritative listed D groups after calibration exclusions
